first thing to note is that you can get by with just about anything until chapter 4 or the end of it so feel free to try things out and see what you like playing with

in terms of value for standard banners

aequor (blue, tentacle) is the best value
caro (red, embryo) and chaos (yellow) are decent value
ultra (purple) is really bad value
Why miryam?

go in the interlude section (the big eye) then go to awaker trial (pictured here)
you get to try every standard character out in a solo fight, which lets you play with their kit and the realm (there's 4 total) and gives you a pull for the standard banner each time you finish it

https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1170692781216378960/1322540824579538944/image.png?ex=678a4c20&is=6788faa0&hm=1a611fddc77e890e23bff9c2ccc3c327ca57477dd092b51c26e038504c405997&=&format=webp&quality=lossless&width=1193&height=671
